title: Bitter Jelly Croatian Semolina Pilaf
description: A date-night Croatian dish featuring semolina, beurre-monte, and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients. This bitter jelly pilaf is perfect for a special occasion or romantic evening.
instructions: Combine semolina and water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring constantly, for 20 minutes or until the mixture has thickened.
Add cinnamon, cardamom, ginger, and turmeric to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add raisins and rose petals to the saucepan and continue to cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let cool slightly.
Mix in beurre-monte, maple syrup, and grape juice until well combined.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups and refrigerate until chilled and set.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight before serving.
Serve cold and garnish with additional rose petals if desired.
To make beurre-monte, whip heavy cream until stiff peaks form, then mix in maple syrup until well combined.
